results.name: Source manifest referential integrity
results.summary: All collected source references should resolve to SOURCE_MANIFEST.jsonl.
results.allowed_claim: Rows with source IDs can be mechanically checked against the manifest; legal authority still depends on verification_status.

results.name: CN claim vocabulary coverage
results.summary: CN claim rows should carry legal basis, case basis, expected output, and VERIFIED status.
results.allowed_claim: CN claim vocabulary is usable as a grounded evaluator fixture set, not as a cross-jurisdiction theorem proof.

results.name: AAF shadow diff executable consistency
results.summary: Recompute grounded extensions from aaf_input and compare them with declared aaf_output.
results.allowed_claim: The dataset can drive AAF/evaluator shadow tests; AAF_LIMITATION rows should be treated as design signals, not legal errors by themselves.

results.name: Cross-jurisdiction obstruction guard
results.summary: Mapping obstructions should be explicit enough to block unsafe CN/US/HK concept merging.
results.allowed_claim: Obstruction rows provide collision/asymmetry witnesses for engineering guards, not a formal proof that no global functor exists.

results.name: Pricing/Banach data insufficiency gate
results.summary: Pricing data should be accepted as proxy-only and blocked from proving real Banach pricing contraction.
results.allowed_claim: DATA_INSUFFICIENT_FOR_REAL_BANACH_PRICING; usable for schema, sensitivity, and downgrade tests only.

results.name: DP epsilon legal-determination gate
results.summary: Legal release classes must not be promoted into numeric epsilon proofs.
results.allowed_claim: Legal data supports a negative gate: epsilon values are policy parameters, not legal-theorem outputs.

results.name: Theorem trust-label downgrade guard
results.summary: Theorem metadata should not promote DATA_INSUFFICIENT/PENDING/LEAN_DRAFT rows into proof labels.
results.allowed_claim: The theorem metadata is suitable as a downstream AI guardrail table, not as a proof ledger replacement.

results.name: Google synthetic data quarantine
results.summary: Synthetic data directory is absent; no synthetic package can be mixed into the real-source manifest.
results.allowed_claim: Google synthetic package is absent; current validation baseline contains no local Google synthetic data dependency.
